record.field: Invoice {{ object.name or 'n/a' }} - Samaa Al Awir Vegetables & Fruits Trading LLC
Static customer invoice email with bank details and GRN reference.

div.p:
Dear Customer,
I hope this email finds you well.
Please find attached Invoice #INV/0001 (referencing Sales Order: SO0001) amounting to 0.00 AED from Samaa Al Awir Vegetables & Fruits Trading LLC.
Kindly use GRN 7009 as the communication/reference for your payment.
Bank Details:
Bank Name: Emirates NBD
Account Name: SAMAA AL AWIR VEGETABLES & FRUITS TRADING LLC
Account Number: 1015774412601
IBAN: AE39 0260 0010 1577 4412 601
SWIFT/BIC Code: EBILAEAD
Please note that if any objection/dispute is not raised within 7 days from receiving this invoice, we will assume everything is in order and approved.
Please remit payment at your earliest convenience and share the payment remittance advice once processed. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.
Thank you for your business.
Best regards,
General Accountant
